name: First-Person Shooter (FPS)
description: Fast-paced action shooter with weapon progression and competitive multiplayer

mechanics.coreLoop: Spawn → Navigate arena → Engage enemies → Eliminate targets → Collect power-ups → Respawn
playerActions: Aim and shoot with various firearms
Sprint, crouch, and slide for tactical movement
Throw grenades and use tactical equipment
Switch between primary and secondary weapons
Use iron sights or scopes for precision

mechanics: Unlock new weapons by reaching score milestones
Earn perks and abilities through match performance
Seasonal battle pass with cosmetic rewards

resourceSystems.name: Ammunition
resourceSystems.mechanics: Limited ammo per magazine, reload required, can scavenge from enemies

resourceSystems.name: Health
resourceSystems.mechanics: Regenerates when not taking damage for 5 seconds

resourceSystems.name: Tactical Equipment
resourceSystems.mechanics: Grenades, flashbangs, smoke - limited uses per life

resourceSystems.name: Killstreak Points
resourceSystems.mechanics: Earned by consecutive kills without dying, spent on air support

setting.location: Global conflict across urban cities, military bases, and war zones

protagonist.background: Elite special forces operative with extensive combat training
protagonist.motivation: Complete the mission and protect allies from hostile threats
abilities: Expert marksmanship with all weapon types

conflict.primary: International terrorist organization threatens global security
secondary: Rogue nation developing weapons of mass destruction
Corporate PMC operating outside the law
Rival special forces teams competing for objectives

worldRules.physics: Realistic bullet physics with drop and travel time. Realistic movement with momentum and weight.
worldRules.magic: None (unless sci-fi variant with energy shields/tech)
worldRules.technology: Modern firearms, drones, tactical gear, communication systems. Advanced optics and night vision.

difficulty: High skill ceiling with fast reflexes required
targetAudience: Players who enjoy competitive combat and precision gameplay
